title: smp hardcore
description: This is a modpack for a hardcore smp minecraft server with your friends
body:
I created my own modpack for Minecraft and uploaded it on CurseForge. My goal was to keep the vanilla experience intact, but enhance it with modern optimizations and visual improvements. No crazy new dimensions or over-the-top mods — just Minecraft, smoother, prettier, and smarter.
The pack includes well-known optimization and visual mods like Sodium and Lithium for better performance, Iris Shaders combined with Complementary Shaders for stunning lighting and realistic reflections, and Zoomify for that classic Optifine-style zoom without the extra clutter.
I also added a few small quality-of-life features such as Low Fire (so fire doesn’t block your view) and the Essentials Mod for useful multiplayer tools. Everything runs smoothly together and feels completely natural — like this is how Minecraft was always meant to be.
In short, this modpack takes vanilla Minecraft to the next level without losing its original charm.
